title: Post a skill — SkillShots
description: Post a skill clip, challenge a player, or go live. Voted by your crew.

sections.title: What did you nail today?
sections.lede: Post your clip. Your crew votes. Pot splits at round end.

sections.title: How posting works
body: One single take, judged on the rules in the challenge.
Your crew votes; the pot splits at the end of the round.

sections.title: Get the rules right
body: Read the challenge spec before you film. Common reasons entries get rejected: cut takes, off-spec props, missing time stamps.
